data.content:
RAG-Anything	RAG-Anything Test Document
functionality testing,system evaluation
The RAG-Anything Test Document is created to assess the capabilities of the RAG-Anything organization and its system.

Document Upload	RAG-Anything
functionality,system features
RAG-Anything provides the Document Upload feature as part of its system functionalities.

RAG-Anything	Text Extraction
document processing,system features
RAG-Anything includes Text Extraction as a key feature in its document processing capabilities.

Knowledge Base Insertion	RAG-Anything
data integration,system features
Knowledge Base Insertion is a part of the operations conducted by RAG-Anything to enrich its database.

Query Capabilities	RAG-Anything
system features,user interaction
Query Capabilities are a function of the RAG-Anything system that allows it to handle user inquiries effectively.
